response:
Angel has written a total of 80 letters. She has divided these letters into two types of envelopes: large and small. The small envelopes hold the last 20 letters. This means the remaining letters are placed in large envelopes. To find out how many letters are in large envelopes, subtract the 20 small letters from the total of 80. That gives 60 letters in large envelopes.

Each large envelope holds 2 letters. To find out how many large envelopes Angel used, divide the number of letters in large envelopes by the number of letters per envelope. So, 60 divided by 2 equals 30. Therefore, Angel used 30 large envelopes.

ANGEL WRITES LETTERS EVERY DAY. SHE PLACES MOST OF THEM INTO LARGE ENVELOPES. THE REST GO INTO SMALL ONES. LARGE ENVELOPES HOLD TWO LETTERS EACH. SMALL ENVELOPES CONTAIN ONLY 20 LETTERS. TOTAL LETTERS ARE 80. SHE NEEDS TO CALCULATE THE NUMBER OF LARGE ENVELOPES. SUBTRACT 20 FROM 80 TO GET 60. DIVIDE 60 BY 2 TO FIND THE NUMBER OF LARGE ENVELOPES. THE RESULT IS 30. SHE USED 30 LARGE ENVELOPES. EVERY LETTER IS ACCOUNTED FOR. SHE HAS FINISHED WRITING AND PACKING. ALL ENVELOPES ARE READY TO SEND. SHE IS READY TO MAIL HER LETTERS. THE PROCESS IS COMPLETE. SHE IS SATISFIED WITH HER WORK. SHE HAS DONE EVERYTHING CORRECTLY. SHE IS A RESPONSIBLE PEN PAL. SHE HAS MAINTAINED GOOD RELATIONSHIPS. SHE IS ALWAYS ON TIME. SHE HAS NEVER MISSED A LETTER. SHE IS A RELIABLE WRITER. SHE HAS A STRONG WORK ETHIC. SHE HAS A GOOD MIND FOR ORGANIZATION. SHE IS ALWAYS PREPARED. SHE HAS A CLEAR PLAN. SHE IS ALWAYS FOCUSED. SHE IS A HARDWORKING PERSON. SHE IS ALWAYS READY. SHE HAS A STRONG WILL. SHE IS ALWAYS DEDICATED. SHE IS ALWAYS HONEST. SHE IS ALWAYS FAIR. SHE IS ALWAYS KIND. SHE IS ALWAYS PATIENT. SHE IS ALWAYS SUPPORTIVE. SHE IS ALWAYS ENCOURAGING. SHE IS ALWAYS KIND-HEARTED. SHE IS ALWAYS LOYAL. SHE IS ALWAYS TRUSTWORTHY. SHE IS ALWAYS HONEST.
